title: cyperus orthostachyus
intro: Cyperus orthostachyus, also known as the Eastern Swamp Sedge, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in various herbal remedies due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Cyperus orthostachyus include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatic pain, and treating various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to reap its therapeutic benefits.
